title: Fix generator: add macOS SDK system includes for CppAst
body:
## Description

Fix the SkiaSharp P/Invoke generator (CppAst-based) to work on macOS by properly configuring system include paths.

## Changes

- **`BaseTool.cs`**: Use `SystemIncludeFolders` instead of `IncludeFolders` for clang headers (fixes `#include_next` resolution). Auto-detect macOS SDK path via `xcrun --show-sdk-path` with fallback to CommandLineTools default.
- **`launchSettings.json`**: Fix trailing comma (invalid JSON).
- **`generate.ps1`**: Minor path fix.

## Problem

The generator failed with:
```
ERROR: 'inttypes.h' file not found at .../clang/.../include/inttypes.h
```

CppAst's clang headers use `#include_next` to chain to system headers, but the SDK include path wasn't configured.

## PR Checklist

- [x] Has tests (verified generator runs successfully)
- [x] Changes adhere to coding standard
